description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in brown from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the high shine leather effect fabric and studded strap will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 38cmWidth: 40cmDepth: 15cmMade of synthetic leather for durability and high gloss shineHas one large main zipped compartment with one internal zipped pocket and mobile pouchOne long, studded handle attached to the bag with adjustable bucklesZip pocket on one sideReinforcing panels on corners and lower edgeCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
